record.comment: Is this proper application of rule, RVS 4/11/2014 e-mail "Prior Provisions"? Similar prov relate to text, not note.
Is this proper application of rule, RVS 4/11/2014 e-mail "Prior Provisions"? Similar prov relate to text, not note.

Sec. 1400F is repealed, consolidated in a spanned repeal of secs. 1400E to 1400J. Note dervied from actsec 401(d)(5)(C) appears as note under the spanned repeal - there's no longer a separate record for 1400F.
